description: "Cognizant partners with Oracle Recruiting to enhance AI-led hiring processes across 60 countries, marking a significant step in global recruitment."
---

Cognizant has announced its collaboration with Oracle Recruiting to implement AI-led hiring solutions across 60 countries. This strategic move aims to streamline and enhance the recruitment process, enabling Cognizant to efficiently scale its hiring efforts in a competitive labor market. The decision comes at a time when organizations are increasingly turning to AI to optimize their operations and improve talent acquisition strategies.

The integration of Oracle Recruiting into Cognizant's hiring framework is expected to leverage advanced AI capabilities to identify, attract, and retain top talent more effectively. This partnership not only reflects Cognizant's commitment to innovation but also positions it favorably against competitors who are also exploring AI-driven recruitment solutions. The ability to operate in 60 countries suggests a robust infrastructure that can support diverse hiring needs, catering to various regional markets and compliance requirements.

In the current landscape, where many companies are struggling to find qualified candidates, Cognizant's initiative could provide a significant advantage. The use of AI in recruiting can reduce time-to-hire, enhance candidate experience, and improve the quality of hires. As noted by [dqindia.com](https://news.google.?oc=5&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US%3Aen), the emphasis on AI in recruitment is becoming a critical differentiator in the tech industry.

As Cognizant moves forward with this initiative, it will be essential to monitor how effectively the company can integrate AI into its hiring processes and the subsequent impact on its workforce and operational efficiency. The success of this partnership could set a precedent for other companies looking to enhance their recruitment strategies through technology.
